description: Verifiable dealings with other agents: prove what you did, vet who you deal with, bind agreements
name: io.github.synpareia/trust-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Where to store profile, recordings, and counterparty journal (default: ~/.synpareia)
environmentVariables.name: SYNPAREIA_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Synpareia network endpoint (default: the live network; set to 'none' for fully-local operation)
environmentVariables.name: SYNPAREIA_NETWORK_URL

environmentVariables.description: Witness service endpoint (default: the live witness; set to 'none' to disable)
environmentVariables.name: SYNPAREIA_WITNESS_URL

title: Synpareia Trust Toolkit
